---Begin OPTIONS List---
===> The following configuration options are available for qsynth-0.4.1:  
     GRADIENT=on: Gradient eye-candy
     SYSTEM_TRAY=on: System-tray icon support
====> Qt toolkit: you have to select exactly one of them  
     QT4=off: Qt 4 toolkit support
     QT5=on: Qt 5 toolkit support
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings  
---End OPTIONS List---

--CONFIGURE_ARGS--
--localedir=/usr/local/share/qsynth  --with-fluidsynth=/usr/local --enable-gradient --enable-system-tray --disable-qt4 --enable-qt5 --prefix=/usr/local ${_LATE_CONFIGURE_ARGS}
--End CONFIGURE_ARGS--
